name: cepa
description: Compound engineering workflow: parallel review agents, solution documentation, batch-first triage, and autonomous execution. Framework-agnostic — adapts to any stack via per-project cepa.local.md configuration.

plugins.name: cepa
plugins.description: 11 review agents (8 roster + 3 signal-dispatched), persona plan review, Implementation-Units plan format, scheduled residual sweep, PR-feedback resolution, solution documentation, batch-first triage, and gated or hands-off execution (/cepa:lfg) for compound engineering workflows
